creator: cejkar@fit.vutbr.cz
text: Yes, PR/269729 seems that it would solve my problem, but it is impossible for me to use it right now, because I did freebsd-update -r 12.4 upgrade & install and pkg upgrade today and freebsd-update fetch says that there are no other updates. So I needed to find something, what else can I do. It seems that nut 2.7.4 did not detach HID and it worked, so 2.8.0 could too :o)
